task: Insurance Fleet Add/Remove — add/remove trucks/trailers from an active policy mid-term. POST /insurance/policies/:id/units is idempotent on asset_id (insert/reactivate) and logs a pro-rata premium delta; DELETE /insurance/policies/:id/units/:unitId soft-deletes (removed_at) and logs a pro-rata premium credit. Both deltas/credits are posted ONLY via the existing accounting createJournalEntry().
financial_rule: NO NEW FINANCIAL CODE — pro-rata premium movements are posted exclusively through createJournalEntry() from apps/backend/src/accounting/journal-entries.service.ts. policy-unit-fleet.service.ts only computes cents + selects two active GL accounts.
acceptance: migration 202606072330 applied — insurance.policy_unit.removed_at column + idempotent grants (ih35_app)
POST /api/v1/insurance/policies/:id/units idempotent on asset_id (insert/reactivate, no double-charge) + pro-rata premium delta via createJournalEntry
DELETE /api/v1/insurance/policies/:id/units/:unitId soft-deletes (removed_at) + pro-rata premium credit via createJournalEntry
Idempotency-Key enforced (existing REQUIRED_MATCHERS /insurance/policies(/|$) already covers /units sub-routes)
all queries RLS-scoped on tenant_id; SQL uses ih35_app role
CI gates: build:backend, frontend tsc, vitest pass
